scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @lucky-wheel/contracts && npm run build --workspace @lucky-wheel/merchant-api && npm run build --workspace @lucky-wheel/api && npm run build --workspace @lucky-wheel/game && npm run build --workspace @lucky-wheel/admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @lucky-wheel/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @lucky-wheel/merchant-api && npm run typecheck --workspace @lucky-wheel/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @lucky-wheel/game && npm run typecheck --workspace @lucky-wheel/admin
